perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of several white, heart-shaped snow sculptures hanging from a tree branch in a snowy outdoor setting. (2) A hand wearing a black fingerless glove holds one of the snow hearts up to the camera. (3) A man in a patterned winter jacket and orange vest is seen crouched on the snow, using a red heart-shaped snowball maker tool to create more snow hearts. (4) He carefully places a newly formed snow heart onto the tree branch. (5) The man then gestures toward the tree and is joined by a woman wearing a yellow top and pink overalls; they pose and smile together in front of the 'Snow Love Tree' with a ski resort-like background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, rhythmic, and melodic background music begins immediately and plays throughout the video. (2) At approximately 0:14, a male voice speaks in Mandarin, saying '送妳的愛心樹, Love Tree' (Giving you the love tree), followed by cheerful laughter from a woman. (3) The music continues at a steady volume with subtle outdoor ambient wind noise until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV：嘎哥的浪漫愛心樹 Snow Love Tree' (Decorative/Hook Text): Appears at the top of the frame throughout the video, setting a romantic and playful tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows an Intro -> Process (making snow hearts) -> Result (revealing the tree) -> Outro (posing) flow.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator and 1 female companion appearing prominently.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male wearing a black and white patterned jacket with an orange vest and polka-dot pants; a female wearing a yellow long-sleeved shirt and pink overalls.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A snowy outdoor area with evergreen trees, a wooden cabin in the distance, and people skiing or snowboarding in the far background.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a creative and romantic way to enjoy the snow by making heart-shaped snow sculptures and hanging them on a tree, likely targeting fans of the creator and those looking for travel/lifestyle inspiration.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While a specific heart-shaped snowball maker tool is used, there is no explicit branding or call to purchase the item.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: 嘎哥 (Ga Ge) brand identity and specific playful editing style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a popular POV format to engage the audience immediately with a visually appealing 'hook' (the snow hearts).
